title: Need help! Timeline Column showing task over due

posts.author: sakhter (Sharmin Akhter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I followed the instructions I found online to link my timeline column to the status column. However, the timeline column continues to say “18+ days over day, etc.” even after I change the task status to completed.

Anyone know why that may be and how to resolve it? Please help! Thank you!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sakhter - welcome to the community. You need to make sure the Completed option within your Status column is set properly. To do this click on the menu option on your column (the “…”) then Settings > Customize Status Column

Then make sure your completed options are set properly. This should solve your issue.

Thanks!
Mark
